message:
style: rustfmt formatting in hostcall_superinstructions module

Apply rustfmt canonical formatting:
- Wrap long saturating_sub expression across two lines
- Reformat chained iterator closure in select_plan_for_trace to use
  trailing closure style instead of multi-line block
- Adjust plan() call formatting in tests: inline short argument lists,
  wrap long argument lists with one-per-line alignment

No logic changes — purely mechanical formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
